channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Complete Results of Rajya Sabha Elections 2026 in Bihar, Odisha, and Haryana
item.description: The Rajya Sabha elections 2026 were conducted on Monday to fill 37 seats across ten states in India. While many candidates were elected unopposed, voting was necessary for eleven seats, including five...

item.title: Government Urged to Compensate Police Brutality Victims and Hold Officers Accountable
item.description: The opinion piece calls on the Kenyan government to take decisive action against ongoing police brutality by compensating victims and punishing the officers responsible. It highlights how police have ...

item.title: Govt Plans Subsidised Fuel Programme for Low-Income Road Users Amid Price Surge
item.description: The federal government of Pakistan is preparing a subsidised fuel scheme aimed at providing relief to motorcyclists and rickshaw drivers following a sharp rise in oil prices, partly triggered by the o...

item.title: Cebu Pacific celebrates anniversary with special P19.96 seat sale
item.description: Cebu Pacific, one of the Philippines’ leading low-cost carriers, is offering a special seat sale priced at P19.96 per seat to celebrate the airline’s founding year and first flight anniversary. This p...

item.title: Trump asks allies to secure Strait of Hormuz but Japan and Australia decline
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has asked other countries to help reopen and protect the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial route for global oil shipments. He said nations relying heavily on Gulf oil should take...

item.title: Rep. Jasmine Crockett responds after security guard dies in police standoff; guard faced impersonation charges
item.description: A security guard employed by Texas Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett, identified as Diamon-Mazairre Robinson, 39, was killed in a SWAT standoff with Dallas Police. Robinson had barricaded himself in a ve...

item.title: Complete List of 2025 Sahitya Akademi Award Winners Across 24 Languages
item.description: The winners of the 2025 Sahitya Akademi Awards were announced on 16th March. This year, the awards recognised outstanding literary works across 24 Indian languages. A total of 24 authors won in variou...

item.title: Multiple Bomb Blasts Kill 23, Injure Over 100 in Maiduguri
item.description: Police for Borno State don confirm say 23 people don die and 108 don get injury after multiple bomb blasts wey scatter Maiduguri on Monday night. The attacks happen around 7:24 p.m. and e target busy ...

item.title: PNP closes in on suspect in Nueva Ecija double murder case
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has identified the gunman responsible for the killing of businesswoman Regine Espinosa and Michael Odchigue, an employee of the Palayan City Disaster Risk Reductio...

item.title: Kerala Congress (M) and BDJS Declare Their Candidates for Upcoming Assembly Elections
item.description: Kerala Congress (M), which is a part of the ruling Left Democratic Front (LDF), and Bharat Dharma Jana Sena (BDJS), an ally of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), have announced the names of their candi...

item.title: Zelensky Visits UK Amid Ongoing Ukraine Conflict and International Tensions
item.description: President Volodymyr Zelensky of Ukraine is scheduled to visit the United Kingdom as the Starmer government reaffirmed its unwavering support for Ukraine despite simultaneous global conflicts. Defence ...

item.title: US and Iran Officials Exchange Messages Amid Ongoing Conflict
item.description: Washington reports indicate that US President Donald Trump's special envoy, Steve Witkoff, and Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi have had some form of direct communication recently, marking the ...

item.title: Kristin Cabot Shares Details About Her Viral Coldplay Kiss and Estranged Husband's Presence
item.description: Kristin Cabot, who gained international attention from a viral kiss cam moment at a Coldplay concert in 2025, opened up about the event in an interview with Oprah Winfrey on 'The Oprah Podcast.' Cabot...

item.title: National Youth Service Begins Countrywide Recruitment to Empower Young Kenyans
item.description: The National Youth Service (NYS) has kicked off a countrywide recruitment exercise, inviting young Kenyans aged between 18 and 24 years to enlist and serve the nation while gaining vital skills and di...

item.title: Pakistan Backs Three-Month Extension of UNAMA Mandate, Highlights Surge in Cross-Border Terrorism from Afghanistan
item.description: The United Nations Security Council has unanimously approved a three-month extension for the United Nations Assistance Mission in Afghanistan (UNAMA), with Pakistan among the 15 member states voting i...

item.title: Alexandra Paul arrested during animal rights protest in Wisconsin
item.description: Alexandra Paul, best known for her role as Stephanie Holden on Baywatch, was arrested in Wisconsin over the weekend after participating in an animal rights protest at Ridglan Farms, a facility that br...

item.title: Residents evacuate as fire damages Tuggeranong apartment roof
item.description: On Tuesday afternoon, a fire broke out on the second-floor balcony of an apartment on Athllon Drive in Greenway, Tuggeranong, prompting the swift response of ACT Fire and Rescue. Station Officer Jake ...

item.title: South Africa Prepares for Sixth Investment Conference Amid Positive Economic Growth
item.description: South Africa is gearing up for its sixth Investment Conference, set to take place at the Sandton Convention Centre on 31 March 2026. Minister of Trade, Industry and Competition Parks Tau highlighted t...

item.title: RBA increases official cash rate to 4.1% amid inflation and geopolitical concerns
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) has raised the official cash rate for the second month in a row, moving it up by 0.25 percentage points to 4.1%, from 3.85%. The decision came after a narrowly spli...

item.title: Practical Steps Canadians Can Take to Reduce Fraud Risk
item.description: Canadians are increasingly targeted by fraud across email, phone, online, and text channels, with nearly half reporting attempts in the past three months. Despite the prevalence, very few cases are of...
